---
title: "audit_dialogue.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\src\tools\debug\audit_dialogue.py"
loc: 44
complexity: 4
logic_score: 5.70
style_score: 3.76
intel_score: 8.67
overall_score: 5.31
---

## Intent
The `audit_dialogue.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on DialogueAuditor, __init__, _resolve, audit, main. It forms a node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via DialogueAuditor, __init__, _resolve, audit, main. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 5.7/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.8/10
- **Intel [I]**: 8.7/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 16 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [argparse](file://argparse)
- [sys](file://sys)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [src.core.engine.dialogue](file://src.core.engine.dialogue)
- [src.core.sovereign_hud](file://src.core.sovereign_hud)
- [src.core.sv_engine](file://src.core.sv_engine)

### Exports
- `DialogueAuditor`
- `__init__`
- `_resolve`
- `audit`
- `main`
